category_sources: Official SourceForge project describes GibbsLDA++ as a C/C++ implementation of Latent Dirichlet Allocation using Gibbs sampling.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GibbsLDA++ project site.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project title uses GibbsLDA++: A C/C++ Gibbs Sampling LDA.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page provides description, downloads, activity, category, and project metadata.
source_facts.homepage is the official project website and best available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project and homepage expose release downloads but no distinct official source-control repository URL was identified, so repo is null.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge description says C/C++ LDA using Gibbs sampling for parameter estimation and inference.
source_facts.executables lists lda and source_facts.homepage identifies the official GibbsLDA++ project.
